"""Repair target for rule-family diversity scaling experiments."""


def apply_rule(value):
    text = str(value).strip().lower().replace("_", " ")
    pieces = [piece for piece in text.split() if piece]
    body = '/'.join(pieces)
    return 'WP_7OYT' + body + '_WSV7VA'
